# Dokumen Kerjasama PMPSTI

```{=latex}
\begin{landscape}
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-cooperation
#| tbl-cap: "Daftar Kerja Sama PMPSTI FT UGM"
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

big_table <- read_csv(
  here("appendix/data", "01_dokumen_kerja_sama_pmpsti.csv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character()),
  na = ""
)

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {

  library(DT)

  big_table <- big_table %>%
    mutate(Dokumen = paste0("<a href='", Dokumen, "' target='_blank'>
                            <button style='padding:3px 8px; cursor:pointer;'>
                            Buka</button></a>"))

  datatable(
    big_table,
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    colnames = c("Judul Kerja Sama", "Bidang", "Mitra",
                 "Periode", "Dokumen", "Tingkat Kerja Sama"),
    style = "bootstrap4",
    class = "table-bordered table-condensed table-hover",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      dom = "lfrtip",
      columnDefs = list(
        list(width = "300px", targets = 0),
        list(width = "120px", targets = 1),
        list(width = "200px", targets = 2),
        list(width = "100px", targets = 3),
        list(width = "80px",  targets = 4),
        list(width = "120px", targets = 5),
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = c(1, 3, 4, 5)),
        list(visible = FALSE, targets = 4)
      ),
      language = list(
        search      = "Cari:",
        lengthMenu  = "Tampilkan _MENU_ data",
        info        = "Menampilkan _START_ sampai _END_ dari _TOTAL_ data",
        paginate    = list(previous = "Sebelumnya", `next` = "Berikutnya"),
        zeroRecords = "Data tidak ditemukan",
        infoEmpty   = "Tidak ada data"
      )
    )
  )

} else {

  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  big_table %>%
    select(-Dokumen) %>%
    kable(
      format     = "latex",
      col.names  = c("Judul Kerja Sama", "Bidang", "Mitra",
                     "Periode", "Tingkat Kerja Sama"),
      booktabs   = TRUE,
      longtable  = TRUE,
      escape     = FALSE,
      align      = c(
        "p{7cm}",
        ">{\\centering\\arraybackslash}p{2.5cm}",
        "p{5cm}",
        ">{\\centering\\arraybackslash}p{2.5cm}",
        ">{\\centering\\arraybackslash}p{3cm}"
      )
    ) |>
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("striped", "repeat_header"),
      stripe_color  = "#F5F5F5",
      font_size     = 9
    ) |>
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE )

}
```

```{=latex}
\end{landscape}
```
